name: insurance brokers managing 5-15 employees tool
description: For insurance brokers managing 5-15 employees, missed certification renewals cause compliance risks. We provide automated tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
problem_solved: Tracking certification renewal deadlines can lead to compliance risks and potential penalties.
